entities.name: DWARFNESS
entities.description: The D1-type dwarf growth characteristic in pigeonpea.

entities.name: ICPX73081
entities.description: A pigeonpea line identified as having the D1-type dwarf trait.

entities.name: PRABHAT
entities.description: A tall, early-maturing variety of pigeonpea.

entities.name: PANT A2
entities.description: A tall, early-maturing variety of pigeonpea.
A tall, midseason variety of pigeonpea.

entities.name: NP(WR)15
entities.description: A tall, late-maturing variety of pigeonpea.

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The process of hybridizing dwarf pigeonpea plants with tall varieties to study inheritance.

entities.name: SEGREGATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of phenotypic ratios in F1, F2, and backcross generations to determine the mode of inheritance.

entities.name: MONOGENIC
entities.description: A genetic trait controlled by a single gene.

entities.name: HOMOZYGOUS
entities.description: A genetic state where two identical alleles are present at a specific locus.

entities.name: RECESSIVE
entities.description: A trait that is only expressed when the organism is homozygous for the allele.
